category.scope_note: Industrial electric motor comparison focused on Indonesia market access under SNI, Ministry of Trade Pertek, ESDM energy efficiency, and Directorate General of Electricity expectations.

target_market_label.zh: 印度尼西亚（SNI / 能矿部）
target_market_label.zht: 印度尼西亞（SNI / 能礦部）

title.en: China-to-Indonesia Industrial Motor Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国工业电动机进入印度尼西亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國工業電動機進入印度尼西亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China industrial AC motor documentation against Indonesia SNI certification, ESDM energy labelling, import Pertek, SNI marking, and grid alignment expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国工业交流电动机文件与印度尼西亚 SNI 认证、ESDM 能效标签、进口 Pertek、SNI 标志及电网适配要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國工業交流電動機文件與印度尼西亞 SNI 認證、ESDM 能效標籤、進口 Pertek、SNI 標誌及電網適配要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SNI conformity assessment, customs determination, ESDM energy-efficiency approval, Pertek approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current BSN, KEMENDAG, ESDM, Directorate General of Electricity, customs, and market-surveillance requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or placing on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SNI 合格评定、海关裁定、ESDM 能效批准、Pertek 批准或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或投放市场前应与合格专业人士核验现行 BSN、KEMENDAG、ESDM、电力总局、海关及市场监管要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SNI 合格評定、海關裁定、ESDM 能效批准、Pertek 批准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或投放市場前應與合格專業人士核驗現行 BSN、KEMENDAG、ESDM、電力總局、海關及市場監管要求。

answer_first.en: Indonesia's practical gaps are procedural rather than electrical: in-scope three-phase AC motors need Indonesian SNI certification, Pertek/import clearance support, SNI marking, and ESDM energy labelling, while 380 V 50 Hz is aligned with China and the IE-class basis is aligned to IEC 60034-30-1.
answer_first.zh: 印度尼西亚的实际差距主要是程序性而非电气参数：适用范围内的三相交流电动机需要印度尼西亚 SNI 认证、Pertek/进口清关支持、SNI 标志和 ESDM 能效标签；380 V 50 Hz 与中国一致，IE 等级基础与 IEC 60034-30-1 对齐。
answer_first.zht: 印度尼西亞的實際差距主要是程序性而非電氣參數：適用範圍內的三相交流電動機需要印度尼西亞 SNI 認證、Pertek/進口清關支持、SNI 標誌和 ESDM 能效標籤；380 V 50 Hz 與中國一致，IE 等級基礎與 IEC 60034-30-1 對齊。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
